news.t: Equable Shares Completes Tax-Free Conversion of EQHEX Mutual Fund into the Equable Shares Hedged Equity ETF trading as HEDG on the NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: HEDG is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Equable Shares Hedged Equity ETF (HEDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that seeks income, risk mitigation and long-term capital appreciation through a covered call options writing strategy. The fund provides US large-cap equity exposure through one or more ETFs, while writing exchange traded call options on the same securities. HEDG was launched on Oct 13, 2025 and is issued by Equable.
